name: Leigh K. Warren, EMILY's List
subject: Digging deep for the final Membership Week >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7c99/24c69fd9/f4a44812/18e07640/3978325186/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFR315N_digital_email_20170314_JunkScience_n-all&source=WQEFR315N_digital_email_20170314_JunkScience_n-all")
---

Peter,

You don't need me to tell you that 2017 is off to a scary start.

With President Trump's encouragement, Republican politicians across the country are pushing some of the most despicable policies we've ever seen -- from an Arkansas law letting women's families sue doctors over abortions to anti-choice bills in Indiana and Idaho based on junk science. This wave of attacks cannot go unanswered.

But here's the thing, Peter: No one is going to do that work for us. To stop these backward bills, we must ramp up efforts to replace their Republican backers with pro-choice Democratic women -- up and down the ballot.

We just kicked off our final EMILY's List membership drive of the year -- and you won't want to miss it.

**[Donate $3 right now to become an EMILY's List member for 2017-- and receive a personalized card to show everyone where you stand when it comes to anti-choice attacks.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7c99/24c69fd9/f4a44812/18e07641/3978325186/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170313_email_MarchMem1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+right+now+to+if+consinConsGroup&utm_campaign=WQEFR315N_digital_email_20170314_JunkScience_n-all&source=WQEFR315N_digital_email_20170314_JunkScience_n-all")**

Your support couldn't be more important. Not only will your gift help current candidates lay the groundwork for victory, but you'll empower tomorrow's leaders by fueling programs like Run to Win that will help elect more women to state and local office than ever before.

It's my job to make sure we have the resources to power all that work. And whether or not we do depends on the willingness of this community to dig deep during moments like these.

**Donate $3 today to become an EMILY's List member before our final membership week ends:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/March-Membership-Week](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7c99/24c69fd9/f4a44812/18e07642/3978325186/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170313_email_MarchMem1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgMarchMembershipW&utm_campaign=WQEFR315N_digital_email_20170314_JunkScience_n-all&source=WQEFR315N_digital_email_20170314_JunkScience_n-all")**

Thanks,

Leigh K. Warren
Chief Administrative Officer, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7c99/24c69fd9/f4a44812/18e07643/3978325186/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170313_email_MarchMem1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFR315N_digital_email_20170314_JunkScience_n-all&source=WQEFR315N_digital_email_20170314_JunkScience_n-all")

\---
If you've donated recently, with a different email address, or offline to become a 2017 member, thank you! It can take several days to process memberships, but don't worry, we have it recorded.

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|

name: The White House
subject: Your 1600 Daily
body:
Everything White House for 3/15/2017. |

**WHITE HOUSE MEMO**
The President is traveling to Michigan today, delivering on his campaign promise to bring back jobs and rebuild America’s manufacturing base. This trip is a celebration of American manufacturing and ingenuity, and a reminder that the American worker continues to be our economy’s most valuable asset. President Trump has made it clear that his administration "will follow two simple rules: Buy American and hire American." Under his leadership, the United States will be the world's great magnet for innovation and job creation.

**GET INVOLVED**
President Trump is committed to making sure all Americans have the opportunity to secure a good job.
[Support Getting Americans Back to Work. Sign the Petition.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7a30dd5349d0ecfb2aeb384badc1d921ab0db0883b18e4e09ab1be00ed0538cf09cbcf11222f88bbe20aa749e53da15f94883b0bb19b319b)

**WHITE HOUSE EVENTS**
President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump are pleased to announce additional details for the 139th White House Easter Egg Roll taking place Monday, April 17, 2017, on the South Lawn of the White House. Those interested in attending can enter the lottery **[here.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7a30dd5349d0ecfb94caf680903266efd5966a1954d9122660855debc25ed49f005fbaf3d0bd693e6144932b4950b56d2315db3aaf001e4c)**

name: The White House
subject: Praise for Judge Neil Gorsuch
body:
We are less than a week away from Judge Gorsuch's hearing. |

In less than a week, the confirmation hearing for Judge Neil Gorsuch to become our next Supreme Court Justice will begin.

Since President Donald J. Trump announced Judge Gorsuch as his nominee, there has been overwhelming, bipartisan support and praise for his experience, knowledge, and deep respect for the rule of law.

Just days ago, the American Bar Association unanimously rated Judge Gorsuch “well-qualified” to serve on the Supreme Court. According to the ABA, the “committee confines its evaluation to the qualities of integrity, professional competence and judicial demeanor,” and even Senator Chuck Schumer has described the ABA assessment as the “gold standard” in evaluating judicial nominations.

In addition to the exciting ABA news, this week, dozens of Judge Gorsuch’s former Harvard Law classmates came together to endorse his nomination, stating that “Judge Gorsuch is the real deal.” The unique perspective of Judge Gorsuch’s classmates, having known him for a quarter-century and watched him in action, is a testament to the incredible kind of justice the Supreme Court will gain once the Senate confirms him. **[Read about their experiences with Judge Gorsuch, here.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=184089167187f7b3ffd4b9de462729379083feace1540d43678f2ba7791b56c82254f8853f9fdd201751236ee9536d2d311f7e637d084cc2)**

It comes as no surprise that Judge Gorsuch is being lauded as a brilliant judge who rules based on the Constitution rather than his own opinions, and regardless of people or politics in the case before him. The _Tampa Bay Times_ , for example, has described Judge Gorsuch as a “well qualified conservative who would not tilt the Supreme Court’s ideological balance” and the _Detroit News_ praised Judge Gorsuch as “highly principled and deeply experienced”.

Just this past week, _The Washington Post_ ran an op-ed describing Judge Gorsuch as a judge who “has ruled for plaintiffs and for defendants; for those accused of crimes as well as for law enforcement; for those who entered the country legally; and for those harmed by environmental damage.” The Post emphasized that Judge Gorsuch’s “approach to resolving legal problems as a lawyer and a judge embodies a reverence for our country’s values and legal system.” **[Read the entire op-ed and learn why there is no principled reason to oppose Judge Gorsuch, here.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=184089167187f7b3cf34fb91309636430985ad4258cc84af493de35b6d7b34fa1cb53ea52052d20a0f71faf64523e1099a69db4fcb174339)**

**If you haven’t already, be sure to[Support Judge Gorsuch and sign the petition. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=184089167187f7b3215d1058d55848c24b80b43db97a76e2af9b7a356e8df7b20891797f5abbbaf10168e0238e31c2d67b7964455153f6bb) And don’t forget to [follow @GorsuchFacts on Twitter](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=184089167187f7b383c729f7eff35a7ee4e1c0f4eadec6234653bad5d979f0f668269f90071354934154eb84c32487c6068f69ef58174b52) to get up-to-date information on Judge Gorsuch before, during, and after his hearing on March 20th. **

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=184089167187f7b35a13e162ee11ef0cc434c622ba7e5cbabae36fff011e7bfa591b29e5719f30df3e32fb0ff3d0418489e16c0bdd158a25) [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=184089167187f7b3ea85696445df86c70d9865b4718bce8796b612af7ff829c12126b2cdd2cb2f5eb9f9d5c1f53173c3e135e5fd26fc87b7)[Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d45996a173c4f0144ab7e326d8c7d254ed7a709bd488838c82e4feee5543dcfd58190d506cf5d9e3cb8d1ce6cf9ac441d1)

name: Shaughnessy Naughton
subject: Stop Trump's war on science
body:
_You received this email because you're a climate advocate. If we reached you in error, please _[unsubscribe.](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e2a/738133e4/33390e55/7f85adff/3696605694/VEsH/ "http://naughton.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe")__

Dear Friend,

Donald Trump is already waging a war on science. A climate denier now leads the EPA. New executive orders aim to gut President Obama's climate actions. And Congressional Republicans are launching an attack on NASA's climate research funding.

Thankfully, Senator Elizabeth Warren took on climate deniers with a powerful statement: _" I'm going to say something that is really controversial in some places in Washington: We believe in science."_

_**[Add your name to stand with Senator Warren and tell President Trump you believe in science >>](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e2a/738133e4/33390e55/7f85adf8/3696605694/VEsE/ "https://naughton.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/we-believe-in-science-petition")**_

Something that 97% of scientists agree on shouldn't be controversial. We know that climate change is real, and it's caused by human activity. Yet Trump's EPA administrator Scott Pruitt recently denied that carbon dioxide is a "primary contributor" to climate chang. He previously coordinated a "secretive alliance" with oil and gas lobbyists, raising dark money from the Koch Brothers and their allies, and even allowing polluters to use his office to attack clean air regulations.

This has the potential to set us back decades. In the past, Democrats and Republicans backed clean air and water standards, combating the damage caused by industrial waste and pollution. Today, with climate deniers like Trump and Scott Pruitt in charge, a dangerous assault on science has already begun that could undo all the progress we've made in the past several decades.

But we can and must work together to stop them. That's why 314 Action, a grassroots organization focused on empowering STEM leaders to advance pro-science policies, is fighting back. Help us make it clear to the Trump administration that you won't let them deny science and harm the environment.

_**[Stand with more than 100,000 supporters and 97% of scientists on the 314 Action team and help us send a message: We won't tolerate climate change deniers, and we believe in science.](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e2a/738133e4/33390e55/7f85adf8/3696605694/VEsF/ "https://naughton.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/we-believe-in-science-petition")**_

Our voices can make a difference. Together, we will hold the climate deniers accountable and make sure we do our part to protect our environment.

Onward,

Shaughnessy Naughton
Founder, 314 Action

[Add Your Name >>](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e2a/738133e4/33390e55/7f85adf8/3696605694/VEsC/ "https://naughton.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/we-believe-in-science-petition")

Paid for by 314action.org

410 1st St SE Suite 310
Washington DC 20003 United States

name: Chris Van Hollen (via DSCC.org)
subject: this is personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
We should be fighting to expand the protections in the Affordable Care Act, not defending them from repeal. I hope I can count on you to stand with Democrats.
---
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3bf/2b07114c/5be37556/736bde9f/1382835595/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trumpcare?source=PT-20170315-VanHollen-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")
Friend --

Like you, I take this health care fight personally. So many people I care about, so many of the hard-working families in my home state, would be directly affected by this dangerous Republican plan to destroy the Affordable Care Act.

The Congressional Budget Office has ruled that the Republican "replacement" plan would kick 24 million people off their insurance, force seniors to pay thousands more for coverage, and strip away critical protections for the most vulnerable Americans.

But you and I both know that these Republicans don't care about the facts. And the truth is, as long as they hold the majority, no American's health care is safe.

**[It's up to us to stop Trump and his Republican pals from repealing the Affordable Care Act and "replacing" it with this sham of a plan. Will you show us you're ready for this fight by adding your name to our petition?](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3bf/2b07114c/5be37556/736bde9f/1382835595/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trumpcare?source=PT-20170315-VanHollen-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")**

I care about the numbers. But when it comes to health care, the math alone won't tell the story.

This fight is about the millions of Americans who rely on the protections of the Affordable Care Act--and it's about the basic values that inspired Democrats to write and pass health care reform in the first place.

That's why Democratic Senators--progressives and moderates alike--are united in this fight. Quality care for everyone is a core value of our party. And this is our chance to prove it.

**[Click here to help by signing our petition and showing that you support quality, affordable health care for every American!](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3bf/2b07114c/5be37556/736bde9f/1382835595/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trumpcare?source=PT-20170315-VanHollen-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")**

**No matter what happens next, Democrats are ready to fight like hell to defeat this cruel plot to steal health care away from millions of Americans.**

But let me tell you one more thing--and this is personal.**As the chairman of the DSCC, the reason I 'm so fired up about adding more Democrats to our caucus is so that Republicans will never again dare to come after our friends and neighbors like this.** We should be fighting to _expand_ the protections in the Affordable Care Act, not defending them from repeal. And this election is our chance not just to hold the GOP accountable, but to start moving forward again.

So if, like me, you're committed to turning the tables on Trump and the Republicans, standing with the DSCC is a great way to start.

**[Sign our petition by clicking here!](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3bf/2b07114c/5be37556/736bde9f/1382835595/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trumpcare?source=PT-20170315-VanHollen-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")**

I'm proud that Democrats are standing together to stop this repeal scheme--and I'm proud to be leading the fight to make sure that Donald Trump never has a filibuster-proof majority in the Senate. I hope I can count on you to stand with us.

Thank you,

Sen. Chris Van Hollen
Chairman, DSCC

P.S. No matter what Trump tweets, no matter what Paul Ryan says, no matter what Republicans do, you can count on this: Democratic Senators are ready to lead the fight to keep moving forward, not backward, so we can build on the success of the Affordable Care Act. **[Say you're with us: Sign our petition and stand with Democrats today!](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3bf/2b07114c/5be37556/736bde9f/1382835595/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trumpcare?source=PT-20170315-VanHollen-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")**

**A quick note on donations, friend:**

The fight ahead on health care is going to be a tough one. Already, the GOP is targeting multiple Senate Democrats with aggressive ad campaigns to support this sham of a health care replacement. 99% of our contributions come from donors giving $200 or less, so when we say we're depending on grassroots donors, we mean it. We don't have the Koch brothers in our corner, but we do have you. We hope you'll pitch today to help Senate Democrats in the fights ahead.

---
Friend --

In February, our GOP counterparts at the NRSC raised more than $5 million.

They're telling reporters that this is their "best off-year February fundraising in the past 16 years."

And reading that news reminded me of something important:

Progressives find new reasons to get engaged every time Donald Trump says something outrageous on Twitter -- **but conservatives are fired up about their new president, too.**

**And right now, they 're putting their money where their mouths are to support Trump and all his Republican allies.**

[**So this month, let 's make sure we match their enthusiasm. Chip in $1 right now to help us stay on pace for March.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/grassroots-fight-back?refcode=DPE-20170315-DSCC_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Looking at fundraising trends so far, we have a pretty good idea what we need to do in March to keep up with the Republicans.

So we're setting a goal of $150,000 between now and midnight tonight to make sure that we're in a good place.

It's going to take some real work to get there, but if we pull it off, we'll be able to start making some of the crucial investments it's going to take to protect our allies in the Senate -- and knock off some of the GOP lawmakers who are working so hard to make Trump's vision for the country become a reality.

It will also send a message to Trump (and all the other Republicans out there) that we're ready to do what it takes to hold him accountable and stand up for our values.

So friend [listen], can we count on you? Donate $1 and help us reach our goal:

**[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/grassroots-fight-back](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/grassroots-fight-back?refcode=DPE-20170315-DSCC_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Thank you (for everything),

Mindy Myers
DSCC Executive Director
